svg.title: Hyperflow v4.3.1 — Advanced multi-agent orchestration with persistent cross-session memory
svg.desc: Per-step multi-level review, persona stitching, adaptive flow profiles. Start anywhere — every step dispatches its own Worker → Reviewer pair.

Thinking-tier review of every worker output (iron rule)
